game_name: Anno 1602: Creation of a New World

special_mechanics.name: Colony Management
special_mechanics.description: Game features economic simulation with resource management, production chains, and colony development mechanics rather than character movement physics

special_mechanics.name: Unit Movement
special_mechanics.description: Military units (musketeers, cannons, warships) have movement mechanics, but specific physics parameters are not documented

tier_notes: Anno 1602 is an RTS/city-building game without character-based platforming mechanics. Movement physics (jump, gravity, acceleration) are not applicable to gameplay design. Available documentation focuses on game strategy, economy simulation, and building mechanics rather than character physics.
